overall.description: First-person shooter gameplay depicting exploration of an industrial warehouse facility with storage bays and corridors, transitioning from indoor artificial lighting to a bright outdoor urban plaza with city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with directional markings and overhead pipes

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through industrial corridor with pistol drawn, navigating past white partition walls marked with blue directional arrows

entered.detail: tall white industrial partition walls with blue directional arrows painted on surfaces
yellow industrial pipes running along the ceiling with exposed ductwork
blue painted text M5 with arrow on white wall indicating zone marking
rectangular skylights in the ceiling allowing natural light into the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a narrow industrial corridor with white partition walls marked with blue directional arrows and M5 zone markings. Overhead yellow pipes and skylights run along the ceiling, providing mixed lighting in this empty warehouse section.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage bay area with numbered loading doors and overhead crane

events.description: entering the storage bay area with large metal security gates and overhead crane structure
player looks upward at the overhead yellow crane and STORAGE BAYS signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the storage bay doors and looking up at the overhead crane structure and signage

entered.detail: large industrial roll-up door marked with number 01 and diagonal stripes
large industrial roll-up door marked with number 03 and diagonal stripes
metal mesh security gate blocking the far end of the storage bay
yellow overhead crane structure with hanging cables and mechanical components
large painted text STORAGE BAYS on the wall above the security gates

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered storage bay area featuring large numbered industrial doors (01 and 03) and an overhead yellow crane. The space has a metal security gate at the far end and STORAGE BAYS signage painted on the wall, with the player looking up at the crane structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: service corridor with open doorways and numbered wall markings

events.description: leaving storage bays and entering narrow service corridors with open doorways

agents.ego_description: moving through service corridors with open doorways on the left, passing wall number 35

entered.detail: open doorways leading to side rooms with yellow safety barriers
blue painted number 35 with downward arrow on white wall
yellow safety barrier bench along the corridor wall
grey metal roll-up door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: The player transitions into narrow service corridors with grey and white walls, passing open doorways with yellow safety barriers. Wall markings including the number 35 are visible as the player moves toward a storage room area.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with stacked cargo containers and equipment

events.description: entering storage room filled with stacked white cargo containers
approaching and examining pallet jack with equipment in the corner

agents.ego_description: navigating around stacked white crates and examining a pallet jack with gear in the corner

entered.detail: tall stacks of white industrial cargo containers with orange latches and labels
yellow manual pallet jack with black handle and mechanical components
grey metal locker cabinets against the far wall
large dark whiteboard or notice board on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a storage room filled with tall stacks of white cargo containers. The space contains metal lockers, a whiteboard on the wall, and a pallet jack with equipment in the corner which the player approaches and examines.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor leading to outdoor urban plaza

events.description: exiting through glass doors into bright outdoor urban environment with city skyline

agents.ego_description: moving through exit corridor and stepping outside into a sunlit plaza with city skyline and parked vehicles

entered.detail: large glass exit doors with metal frame leading outside
sunlit outdoor plaza with paved stone tiles and landscaping
modern city skyline with tall skyscrapers visible in the distance
black SUV parked near the building entrance
contemporary building structure with glass and concrete facade

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the final exit corridor toward glass doors, then transitions dramatically into a bright outdoor urban plaza. The scene reveals a modern city skyline with skyscrapers, parked vehicles, and contemporary buildings under clear midday skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sterile industrial facility that eventually opens into a bright, modern urban plaza. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor defined by white partition walls, blue directional arrows, and overhead yellow pipes under mixed skylight illumination. As the camera moves forward, the space expands into a semi-covered storage bay featuring large numbered doors and a massive overhead crane before shifting back into tight service corridors marked with yellow safety barriers. The path then leads into a cluttered storage room filled with stacks of white cargo containers and metal lockers, where the camera pauses to examine a pallet jack. Finally, the movement pushes through a final exit corridor and glass doors, transitioning dramatically from the enclosed warehouse into a sun-drenched city square surrounded by skyscrapers and parked vehicles under a clear midday sky.
